newsroomStories.title: Where Creativity Meets Community
newsroomStories.listingTitle: New campaign showcases CCA creativity across Bay Area
newsroomStories.summary: From bamboo structures to sculptural fashion, the campaign celebrates student creativity across Bay Area transit and demonstrates CCA's edge effect.

image.alt: Two promotional banners for California College of the Arts (CCA) mounted on an urban street pole against a concrete building backdrop with yellow-leafed trees visible. The left banner features close-up hands touching vibrant blue and purple crystalline or textile materials, with the text "WHERE EXPERIMENTATION" and "CCA". The right banner showcases a fashion design student's work from the BFA Fashion Design 2025 program, featuring a model in a dramatic silver-blue striped avant-garde dress.
